joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Comedian: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the math book look sad? Because it had too many problems!
Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it had a virus!
Why did the tomato blush? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the music teacher go to jail? Because she got caught with too many notes!
Why don't some couples go to the gym? Because some relationships don't work out!
Why did the calendar go to therapy? Its days were numbered!
Why did the ocean break up with the pond? She thought he was too shallow!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed space!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the cat sit on the computer? Because it wanted to keep an eye on the mouse!
Why did the cloud break up with the storm? It found him too draining!
Why did the librarian get kicked off the plane? Because it was overbooked!
Why did the pillow go to school? To get a little more cushion for its knowledge!
Why did the candle quit its job? It was burned out!
Why did the mirror break up with the wall? It just couldn't see itself staying there anymore!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? To get a root canal!
Why did the ghost go to the party? Because he heard it was going to be a boo-last!
Why did the comedian go to art school? Because he wanted to draw a crowd!
Why did the elevator break up with the stairs? It just couldn't handle the ups and downs!
Why did the light bulb fail his test? Because he wasn't too bright!
Why did the shoe go to therapy? It had too many sole-searching issues!
Why did the clock get kicked out of the library? It was ticking too loudly!
Why did the mountain break up with the hill? It thought the hill was too beneath it!
Why did the bee get married? Because he found his honey!
Why did the banker break up with his calculator? She felt he was just counting on her too much!
